title: Add CI job for profile quickstart and preflight-json smoke tests
body:
## Goal
Add a CI workflow that builds `go-trader`, generates stock/currency/crypto profile configs, and validates `--preflight-json` output.

## Acceptance criteria
- Build scheduler binary in CI.
- Run `go-trader init --profile stocks --stock-symbols SPY --output <tmp>`.
- Run `go-trader init --profile currency --currency-symbols 6E --output <tmp>`.
- Run `go-trader init --profile crypto --assets BTC --output <tmp>`.
- Assert `--preflight-json` emits parseable JSON with `status`, `exit_code`, and `issues`.
- Keep tests offline or mocked where possible.

title: Add direct stocks/equities trading profile beyond Robinhood options
body:
## Goal
The current `stocks` profile creates Robinhood stock-options strategies. Add a direct equities/stock trading path for users who want stock shares/ETFs instead of options.

## Acceptance criteria
- Define supported stock symbols and default strategies for direct equity trading.
- Add init/profile flags for equities if separate from options.
- Add adapter/script support or document the selected broker/platform.
- Add paper-mode tests and preflight checks.

title: Add currency/FX live trading path beyond CME FX futures
body:
## Goal
The `currency`/`fx` profile currently routes to TopStep/CME FX futures. Add or document a direct FX/currency trading path if the desired product is spot FX rather than futures.

## Acceptance criteria
- Decide target broker/platform for spot FX or currency CFDs.
- Add adapter and check script if supported.
- Add profile defaults and preflight credential checks.
- Keep CME FX futures profile working.

title: Add mocked quickstart smoke tests for scripts/quickstart-profile.sh
body:
## Goal
Test the quickstart helper script without relying on external market data or credentials.

## Acceptance criteria
- Add tests for `--help`, unknown profile rejection, config backup behavior, `STRICT=1`, and `RUN_ONCE=1` wiring.
- Mock or stub `./go-trader` where full binary execution is not needed.
- Ensure tests run in CI without network access.

title: Expand preflight audit to cover state DB, writable paths, and status-port readiness
body:
## Goal
Preflight currently checks config risk rails, runtime files, credentials, and perps stop losses. Expand it to catch more operational failures before daemon startup.

## Acceptance criteria
- Check DB parent directory exists and is writable.
- Warn when state DB is missing for live strategies unless explicitly allowed.
- Check log directory parent is writable.
- Optionally validate requested status port availability.
- Add unit tests for each finding.

title: Document live credential setup for stocks, currency futures, crypto, and OKX
body:
## Goal
Create a single operator doc for live credential environment variables and safe live-mode rollout.

## Acceptance criteria
- Cover Hyperliquid, TopStep, Robinhood, and OKX env vars.
- Include `.env` example with placeholders only.
- Explain paper vs live mode changes.
- Link to `START_SAFE.md`, `QUICKSTART.md`, and preflight commands.

title: Add dashboard/status screenshots or examples to quickstart docs
body:
## Goal
Help new users verify that the bot is actually running by showing expected `/health`, `/status`, and dashboard output.

## Acceptance criteria
- Add sample `/health` response.
- Add redacted/sample `/status` response.
- Add dashboard URL and loopback/VPN guidance.
- Include troubleshooting section for common startup failures.
